layers.name: API HTTP Adapters
layers.description: REST controllers, generated API implementations, exception handlers, filters, and DTO mappers.

layers.name: Security And Tenancy
layers.description: Keycloak, role authorization, stateless CSRF, IP privacy, tenant resolution, and tenant context.

layers.name: Facades And Use Cases
layers.description: Workflow-level orchestration for registration, session creation, assignment, chat operations, notifications, and rollback.

layers.name: Domain Services
layers.description: Business services for users, sessions, agencies, consultants, drafts, notifications, Matrix, statistics, and admin operations.

layers.name: External Service Adapters
layers.description: Keycloak, Rocket.Chat, Matrix, generated clients, and OpenAPI contracts for ORISO peer services.

layers.name: Persistence And Data
layers.description: JPA entities, repositories, Liquibase changelogs, and persisted domain model.

layers.name: Scheduled Workflows
layers.description: Deletion, deactivation, inactive-account notification, and enquiry notification schedulers/services/actions.

layers.name: API Contracts
layers.description: Inbound OpenAPI specifications for UserService, conversation, appointment, admin, and statistics APIs.

layers.name: Runtime Config And Deployment
layers.description: Application profiles, Maven build, Docker image, deployment scripts, logging, monitoring, and runtime properties.

layers.name: Test Suite
layers.description: Unit and integration tests covering controllers, services, workflows, repositories, adapters, and authorization.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Existing README, ADR, flowcharts, PlantUML, and architecture diagrams.

layers.name: Miscellaneous
layers.description: Repository support files outside primary architectural layers.

tour.title: Runtime Entry And Build
tour.description: Start with the Spring Boot entry point, Maven build, application properties, and Dockerfile to understand how UserService starts and is packaged.

tour.title: API Surface
tour.description: Read the generated OpenAPI contracts and their controller implementations for users, admins, conversations, appointments, and statistics.

tour.title: Security And Tenant Context
tour.description: Follow request authorization through Keycloak, role mapping, CSRF checks, and optional tenant resolution.

tour.title: Registration And Session Lifecycle
tour.description: Understand registration, consulting-type selection, session creation, assignment, chat setup, and rollback paths.

tour.title: External Systems
tour.description: Study outbound adapters for Keycloak, Rocket.Chat, Matrix, appointment, agency, tenant, mail, message, live, statistics, and settings services.

tour.title: Persistence And Scheduled Workflows
tour.description: Review JPA models/repositories, Liquibase migrations, and scheduled cleanup/deactivation/notification workflows.
